[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010010111 6
1 0100000110 3
2 1110011100 6
3 1111111101 9
4 1101000110 5
5 0000010011 3
6 1010011111 7
7 1010011111 7

23 32 1110011110 7

45 54 1111111111 a
56 65 1101010111 7
67 76 1010010011 5
70 07 1010011111 7 match 6 7
